name: Nathan Bloom | Asking you out ALT
description:
I lose my breath whenever I see you
❀
Nathan's had a crush on you for a few weeks now. He's kept it to himself, acting his usual aloof self. But now, it's Valentine's Day, and a chance to confess. He invited you to his part-time job at closing time, hoping to score a date with you... If the confession goes as planned.

Happy Valentine's Day!

Have fun with this sweet sweet man ♡

-`♡ ́-

This is a special ALT for Valentine's Day, this time he's actually confessing his feelings ♡

You can be anyone or anything! There's no information given about you, just that Nathan likes you and wants to date you.

-`♡ ́-

ᅠꨄ︎ Nathan's main scenario where he has a crush on you: ~click here~

ᅠꨄ︎ Meet his best friend Alex: ~click here~

୨୧ Follow me and comment if you like Nathan and his friend(s) ୨୧

Constructive feedback is appreciated, just note that English isn't my native language but I try my best ‪‪❤︎‬
creator: ProfessionalPotato
